<title>University of Exeter | A Top Worldwide University</title>
<meta charset="utf-8">

<style>
.full-width-section { margin-bottom:0px!important; }
.full-width-section.kpis a{color:#fff;text-decoration:underline}
.full-width-section.kpis a:hover{color:#00dca5 !important;}
a {text-decoration: unset; text-underline-position: unset; }
p {margin-bottom: 10px; }
#hero {background-size: cover;background-position: top;padding-top: 30px;padding-bottom: 0px;}
#hero .call-to-action {display: inline-block;padding: 10px 30px;}
#hero .col-md-8 h1 {
font-size: 38px;
    color: #fff;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 1px #000;
    -moz-text-shadow: 1px 1px 1px #000;
    margin-top: 0px;
padding: 15px; 
font-weight: bold;
    background-color: rgba(109, 142, 43, 0.6); /* background: #1d4e8a8c; */
margin-bottom: 0;
display: inline-block;
}
#hero .col-md-8 h2{
font-size: 28px;
    line-height: 34px;
    color: #fff;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 1px #000;
    -moz-text-shadow: 1px 1px 1px #000;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
background: #0000007d; 
    padding: 20px;
font-weight: normal;
}
#main-container{margin-top:0}
#call-to-actions {color:#fff;}
.call-to-action.button{border-radius: 30px;}
#call-to-actions .container {margin-top: -20px; margin-bottom: -20px;}
#call-to-actions h2 {color:#fff;}
#course-search {padding: 50px 20px 50px 15px;}
#course-search .input-group {margin: 20px 0;}
#course-search .fa-search {font-size: 24px;}

#course-search h2 {color: #00dea5;}
#open-days{padding: 50px  15px 50px 20px; text-align: center;background: #002727;}
#open-days .title{font-size: 18px;}

#feature {background-size: cover;color: #fff;min-height: 400px;}
#feature p {
	font-size: 25px;
	font-weight: bold;
        line-height: 35px;
	text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	-moz-text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	display: inline-block;
	background: #0000007d;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
}
#feature h2 {
	font-size: 34px;
	font-weight: bold;
        line-height: 38px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
	text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	-moz-text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	display: inline-block;
	background: #0000007d;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
}
#feature h2, #feature a {color: #ffffff;}
#feature a {text-decoration: unset; text-underline-position: unset; color: #e4d695!important;}
#feature a:hover {color: #e4d695; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4d695;}
#feature2, #feature-era {
	background-size: cover;
	color: #dfddde;
	min-height: 400px;
        margin-bottom: 1px;
}
#feature2 p, #feature-era p {
	font-size: 25px;
	font-weight: bold;
        line-height: 35px;
	text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	-moz-text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	display: inline-block;
	background: #0000007d;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
}

#feature2 h2, #feature-era h2 {
	font-size: 34px;
	font-weight: bold;
        line-height: 38px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
	text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	-moz-text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	display: inline-block;
	background: #0000007d;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
}
#feature2 h2, #feature a, #feature-era h2, #feature-era a {color: #ffffff;}
#feature2 a, #feature-era a {text-decoration: unset; text-underline-position: unset; color: #0dbcf6;}
#feature2 a:hover, #feature-era a:hover {color: #0dbcf6;border-bottom: 1px solid #0dbcf6;}
#feature3 {
	background-size: cover;
	color: #dfddde;
	min-height: 400px;
        margin-bottom: 1px;
}
#feature3 p {
	font-size: 25px;
	font-weight: bold;
        line-height: 35px;
	text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	-moz-text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	display: inline-block;
	background: #0000007d;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
}
#feature3 h2 {
	font-size: 34px;
	font-weight: bold;
        line-height: 38px;
        margin-bottom: 20px;
	text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	-moz-text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
	display: inline-block;
	background: #0000007d;
	padding: 5px 15px 5px 15px;
}
#feature3 h2, #feature a {color: #ffffff;}
#feature3 a {text-decoration: unset; text-underline-position: unset; color: #0dbcf6;}
#feature3 a:hover {color: #0dbcf6;border-bottom: 1px solid #0dbcf6;}

#footer {margin-top: 0px; }
.kpis .feature-box-set{display: flex;}
.kpis .feature-box-set img{margin:0px auto}
.kpis .feature-box-set div{display: flex;justify-content: center;flex-direction: column;text-align: center;}
.kpis .feature-box-set h3{color:#007ab5; }
#news h2, #events h2 {color: #000;} 
#news h2 a, #events h2 a {font-size:17px; }


#feature2 .col-lg-8, #feature .col-lg-8, #feature-era .col-lg-8{background: #ffffffb3;border-radius: 45px;padding-top: 30px;}
#feature3 .col-lg-8, #feature .col-lg-8{background: #ffffffb3;border-radius: 45px;padding-top: 30px;}
#feature .col-lg-8{padding-left: 30px;}
#feature2 .col-lg-8, #feature-era .col-lg-8{padding-right: 30px;}
#feature3 .col-lg-8{padding-right: 30px;}
#footer-bot-links a{font-size:15px;}
#homepage-news #news{padding: 0 30px;}
#homepage-news h2{color: #003b3c;}
#homepage-news{background:#f4fcfa;padding-top: 50px !important;padding-bottom: 50px !important;}
#homepage-news h2 a{color: #007d69;}
#homepage-news h2 a::after {
    font-family: 'Font Awesome\ 5 Free' !important;
    content: ' \f105' !important;
    margin-left: 10px !important;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: bold;
}

/* Custom, iPhone Retina */ 
@media only screen and (min-width : 320px) {
	/*#hero h1{font-size: 38px;margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 20px;}
	#hero h2{font-size: 20px;line-height: 25px;}*/
	#course-search button {margin-top: 20px;}
	#call-to-actions{background: #061f3d}
}
/* Small Devices, Tablets */
@media only screen and (min-width : 768px) {
	#course-search button{margin-top: unset;}
}
/* Medium Devices, Desktops */
@media only screen and (min-width : 1200px) {
	#call-to-actions{background: linear-gradient(to right, #727f87 , #727f87 75%, #061f3d 25%, #061f3d);}
}

@media only screen and (max-width : 768px) {.checkbox-inline+.checkbox-inline, .radio-inline+.radio-inline {margin-left: 0;}}
</style>
<link rel="preload" href="https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/32478-1440x400.webp" as="image">
<style>
@media only screen and (max-width : 1150px) {
#hero img{display:none}
#hero{
background-image: url(https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/32478-1440x400.webp);
    min-height: 450px;
    background-size: cover;
    background-color: black;
    background-position: top right;
    padding-top: 30px;
    padding-bottom: 0px;
}
#hero h1{margin-top:20px;}
}
#hero {background-color: black;}
#hero .button {
    color: #003b3c !important;
    background-color: #00dea5;
}
#hero .call-to-action:focus, #hero .call-to-action:hover {
    color: #fff !important;
    background: #00c592;
}
#hero h1{
    font-size: 17px;
}
#hero h2{
border-bottom: unset;
font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 5rem);
    line-height: 1.2;
    font-weight: 700;
}
#hero p.text{}
#hero span {
    padding: 15px;
    text-shadow: unset;
    -moz-text-shadow: unset;
    color: #fff;
    margin-top: 0px;
    padding: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    background-color: rgb(0 60 60 / 73%);
    margin-bottom: 0;
    display: inline-block;
}
#hero .call-to-action {display: inline-block;padding: 10px 30px;}
#hero .col-md-8{margin: 60px 0;}
#main-container{margin-bottom: -2px;}
#call-to-actions{background: #003b3c;}
#feature h2, #feature p, #feature2 h2, #feature2 p, #feature-era h2, #feature-era p{
text-shadow: unset;
    -moz-text-shadow: unset;
    display: inline-block;
    background: unset;
	color:#003b3c;
	font-weight: unset;
}
#feature .button, #feature2 .button, #feature-era .button {
    color: #00dea5 !important;
    background-color: #003b3c;
	display: inline-block;
    padding-left: 20px;
    padding-right: 20px;
	}
#feature .button:hover, #feature2 .button:hover, #feature-era .button:hover {color: #fff !important;background: #00c592;}
#feature h2, #feature2 h2, #feature-era h2{font-size: 50px;line-height: 1.2;font-weight: unset;}
#feature p {font-weight: unset;line-height: 1.5;}
#feature span, #feature2 span, #feature-era span{color: unset;}
#feature a:hover, #feature2 a:hover{border-bottom: 1px solid #00dea5;}	
/*
@media only screen and (min-width : 1200px) {
	#feature {
background: url(https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/AMR-banner.jpg) no-repeat;
	    background-size: 695px;
	}
	#feature2 {
		background: url(https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/legal-ethics-banner.jpg) no-repeat;
		background-size: 695px;
		background-position: right;
padding: 0 !important;
	}
#feature-era {
		background: url(https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/homepage-banner-QS-ranking.jpg) no-repeat;
		background-size: 695px;
		background-position: right;
padding: 0 !important;
	}
}
*/
section.full-width-section.kpis{background:#003c3c;padding-top: 90px !important;padding-bottom: 70px !important;}
.kpis .feature-box-set h3, .kpis .feature-box-set sup,.kpis .feature-box-set a:focus, .kpis .feature-box-set a:hover {color: #fff;}
.kpis .feature-box-set h3{text-align:left;font-size: unset;}
.kpis .feature-box-set {display: unset;}
.kpis .feature-box-set div {padding: 0 30px 0 30px;}
#full-width-testimonials .testimonial .quote {font-size: 25px;}
#full-width-testimonials .carousel-indicators .active, .carousel-indicators li:hover {background-color: #00dda5;}
#full-width-testimonials .carousel-indicators li {border: 2px solid #fff;}
#full-width-testimonials .testimonial .quote {font-weight: unset;color:#fff}
#full-width-testimonials .testimonial .name{font-weight:bold}
#full-width-testimonials .testimonial .name, #full-width-testimonials .testimonial .job {color:#00dda5}
#testimonial-carousel{border-bottom: solid #00d49d 5px;}
#footer-map {margin-top: -38px;}
@media only screen and (max-width : 768px) {
/*section.full-width-section h2{font-size: 30px !important;}*/
#feature .pull-right{float:unset !important}
}
</style>
<link rel="preload" href="https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/homepage-banner-SOMO2.webp" as="image">
<link rel="preload" href="https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/MOU-signing-1920x514.webp" as="image">
<style>
.full-width-section{border-bottom: 1px solid #003c3c;}
.homepage-full-width-section{
    padding-top: 0 !important;
    padding-bottom: 0 !important;
}
.homepage-full-width-section h3, .full-width-section h2 {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 5rem);
    line-height: 1.2;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #003b3c;
}

.homepage-full-width-section h2{
color:  #007d69;
border-bottom: 1px solid #007d69;
font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
    margin-top: clamp(1.8rem, 4vw, 2rem);
}

.homepage-full-width-section .image-text-wrapper {
  display: grid;
  position: relative;
}

.homepage-full-width-section .header-image {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  grid-area: 1 / 1;
}

.homepage-full-width-section .text-content {
  grid-area: 1 / 1;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #003b3c;
  padding-left:15%;
}

.homepage-full-width-section.image-left .text-content{
	padding-left:unset;
	left: 33.33333333%;
}


.homepage-full-width-section .button {
    color: #00dea5 !important;
    background-color: #003b3c;
    display: inline-block;
    padding-left: 20px;
    padding-right: 20px;
	text-align: center;
    font-weight: 400;
	margin-bottom: 20px;
	border-radius: 30px;
}

.homepage-full-width-section .button:hover {
    color: #fff !important;
    background: #00c592;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .homepage-full-width-section .text-content {
    padding: 20px 15px;
  }
}


</style>

<link rel="preload" href="https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/homepage-banner-Woman-in-science.webp" as="image">

<style>
#display-feed-panels .panel-body .post-title{font-weight:700}#display-feed-panels .panel-body img{margin-bottom:10px}#display-feed-panels .panel-body a{text-decoration:none}#display-feed-panels .panel-body:hover{background:#caefe5;font-weight:unset}
</style><link rel="preload" href="https://www.exeter.ac.uk/v8media/recruitmentsites/images/homepage/TEF-2023-banner.webp" as="image">
<style>
		.carousel-indicators:focus, .carousel-indicators:focus-within{
			outline: thin dotted;
    outline-offset: 0px;
		}
 .carousel-pause-buttons{
  	position: absolute;
    bottom: 20px;
	left:20px;
    z-index: 1;
	}
	@media only screen and (max-width : 480px) {
	#full-width-testimonials .carousel-indicators {
    left: 45%;
}
	}

#full-width-testimonials .testimonial{margin-top:1px;margin-bottom:1px;}
#full-width-testimonials #testimonial-carousel .col-md-6-quote{padding: 20px 20px 20px 40px}



#full-width-testimonials{padding-top: 0 !important;}
#full-width-testimonials #testimonial-carousel .col-md-6-quote{min-height:540px;padding-top: 40px;}
#full-width-testimonials .carousel-indicators {
    bottom: 5px;
    position: absolute;
    margin-left: unset;
    width: unset;
    margin: unset;
}
 #full-width-testimonials .img {height:100%;background-size: cover;background-repeat: no-repeat;background-position: top left;}
.testimonial{margin-bottom:20px;background-color: #003c3c;}
.testimonial .left-col{padding: 20px 20px 20px 40px}
.testimonial .quote{color: #002727;}
.testimonial .name{color: #002727;margin-bottom:0}

#full-width-testimonials {padding-top: 0;padding-bottom: 0;}
#full-width-testimonials .container-fluid, #full-width-testimonials .col-md-12{padding-right: 0;padding-left: 0;}
#full-width-testimonials .carousel {margin-bottom: 0;}
#full-width-testimonials .carousel-indicators {bottom: 20px;}

#full-width-testimonials .btn-default {
    color: #003c3c;
    background-color: #01d09a;
    border-color: #01d09a;
}



/* Handle full width testimonials */
@media (max-width: 1740px) {
	#full-width-testimonials .testimonial .col-md-6-quote .col-md-8{width: 100% !important;}
}
.col-md-10.col-md-6-quote{display: flex;align-items: center;flex-direction: row-reverse;flex-wrap: nowrap;}

#full-width-testimonials .testimonial .name{font-weight:unset}

.col-md-8.pull-right {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 100%;
}


#full-width-testimonials p{font-size: clamp(2rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .testimonial .row {
    display: unset;
	}
	#full-width-testimonials #testimonial-carousel .col-md-6-quote {
    min-height: unset;
	padding-top: unset;
	margin-bottom:20px
	}
}
</style>
